name: golang-github-klauspost-crc32-dev
title: golang-github-klauspost-crc32-dev
description:
CRC32 hash with x64 optimizations
This package is a drop-in replacement for the standard library hash/crc32
package, that features SSE 4.2 optimizations on x64 platforms, for a
10x speedup.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-klauspost-crc32-dev because CRC32 hash with x64 optimizations.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-klauspost-crc32-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-klauspost-crc32-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-klauspost-crc32-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
